tables.name: projects
tables.comment: A portfolio project — the unit that groups repositories and can consume microservice projects.

columns.name: project_type
columns.comment: Added v12, default 'standard'. No SQL CHECK — the legal vocabulary is enforced in Rust only.

columns.name: sort_order
columns.comment: Manual ordering (v14); back-filled as id * 10 to leave gaps for inserts.

columns.name: auto_sync_enabled
columns.comment: v28 — 0/1 opt-in for the background auto-sync timer.

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE projects (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name TEXT NOT NULL,
            description TEXT,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        , project_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'standard', sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, auto_sync_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

tables.name: settings
tables.comment: Flat key/value application settings. Never holds secrets — the GitHub PAT and the encryption data key live in the OS credential store.
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE settings (
            key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            value TEXT
        )

tables.name: templates
tables.comment: Deploy/scaffold template files per language key, including each stack's meta.json (v25 reads it to decide which placeholders are repo-scope).

columns.name: is_custom
columns.comment: 0 = seeded from the bundled templates, 1 = edited by the user (never overwritten by re-seeding).

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE templates (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            language_key TEXT NOT NULL,
            file_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            content TEXT NOT NULL,
            is_custom INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            UNIQUE(language_key, file_name)
         )

tables.name: project_microservices
tables.comment: Many-to-many link between a parent project and a consumed microservice project. Rebuilt in v12 — before that it linked a project to a repository. Composite PK plus CHECK(project_id != microservice_project_id), so a project cannot consume itself.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (microservice_project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "project_microservices" (
            project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            microservice_project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            PRIMARY KEY (project_id, microservice_project_id),
            CHECK (project_id != microservice_project_id)
         )

tables.name: repositories
tables.comment: A repository belonging to at most one project. May be GitHub-backed or local-only.

columns.name: project_id
columns.comment: ON DELETE SET NULL — the only non-cascading FK in the schema. Deleting a project orphans its repositories rather than destroying them.

columns.name: github_name
columns.comment: UNIQUE, and nullable since v13 so local-only repos (never pushed to GitHub) can exist. The last path segment is the canonical folder name used for all cross-repo doc folders.

columns.name: role
columns.comment: 'microservice' is still legal here but is legacy: v12 NULLed every such row when microservice became a project type rather than a repo role.

columns.name: github_id
columns.comment: Stable GitHub identifier — the basis of rename detection.

columns.name: deploy_target
columns.comment: Matches templates.language_key.

columns.name: bugs_migrated_at
columns.comment: Lazy-migration marker (v18); NULL means the repo's MD has never been imported.

columns.name: tasks_migrated_at
columns.comment: Lazy-migration marker (v21). While NULL, the first task sync suppresses 'created' events so backfilling legacy files doesn't flood the timeline.

columns.name: deploy_repo_config
columns.comment: v25 — JSON map of repo-wide (not per-environment) deploy placeholder values.

columns.name: autocommit_branch
columns.comment: v28 — NULL means auto-commit is off for this repo.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            project_id INTEGER REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
            github_name TEXT UNIQUE,
            github_url TEXT,
            role TEXT CHECK(role IN ('server','client','test_client','admin_client','microservice','landing','tool','other')),
            description TEXT,
            language TEXT,
            last_pushed_at DATETIME,
            added_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            local_path TEXT,
            github_id INTEGER,
            deploy_target TEXT
         , sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, bugs_migrated_at TEXT, tasks_migrated_at TEXT, deploy_repo_config TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', autocommit_branch TEXT)

tables.name: repo_renames
tables.comment: Append-only log of repository renames, written when a known github_id shows up under a new github_name. The sync preamble replays every entry to rename cross-repo folders on the counterparty's disk. There is deliberately no applied_at column — idempotency comes from filesystem checks, not DB state.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE repo_renames (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            repository_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            old_canonical TEXT NOT NULL,
            new_canonical TEXT NOT NULL,
            renamed_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
         )

tables.name: bugs
tables.comment: Source of truth for bug reports. docs/bug-reports.md in each repo is a generated, LLM-facing view of this table — protected fields are restored from here on every reconcile.

columns.name: numeric_id
columns.comment: Per-repository counter; display_id is its rendered form (B-000042).

columns.name: fix_attempts
columns.comment: App-managed: incremented on each transition into 'testing'. Never written by an AI agent — this is what makes the attempt history honest.

columns.name: archived_from_md_at
columns.comment: v22 — set when the agent removes a confirmed row from the MD file. After that, regeneration permanently excludes the row.

indexes.name: idx_bugs_confirmed_at
indexes.def:
CREATE INDEX idx_bugs_confirmed_at ON bugs(confirmed_at)
             WHERE confirmed_at IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: idx_bugs_repo_date
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_bugs_repo_date ON bugs(repository_id, created_at)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE bugs (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            repository_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            numeric_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
            display_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
            description TEXT NOT NULL,
            severity TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(severity IN ('critical','major','medium','minor')),
            category TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(category IN ('ui_ux','ux_flow','logic','auth','database','performance','security','integration','other')),
            status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('created','in-progress','testing','rejected','confirmed')),
            fix_attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            comment TEXT,
            confirmed_at TEXT, archived_from_md_at TEXT,
            UNIQUE(repository_id, numeric_id)
         )

tables.name: bug_events
tables.comment: Append-only bug lifecycle log (v19), so attempts-per-period metrics are computed from events rather than a running counter. Invariant: the count of 'entered_testing' events for a bug equals bugs.fix_attempts.

indexes.name: idx_bug_events_type_ts
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_bug_events_type_ts ON bug_events(event_type, ts)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (bug_id) REFERENCES bugs (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE bug_events (
             id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
             bug_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES bugs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             event_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(event_type IN (
                 'created','taken','entered_testing','confirmed','rejected','reopened'
             )),
             ts TEXT NOT NULL,
             from_status TEXT,
             to_status TEXT
         )

tables.name: deploy_environments
tables.comment: One deploy environment (prod / staging / any custom name) for a repository; 1:N per repo since v20, which replaced the single deploy_manifests row.

columns.name: extras
columns.comment: JSON map of environment-scope placeholder values. Repo-wide ones live in repositories.deploy_repo_config.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE deploy_environments (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            repository_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            name TEXT NOT NULL,
            workflow_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            image_tag TEXT NOT NULL,
            compose_service TEXT NOT NULL,
            domain TEXT NOT NULL,
            deploy_branch TEXT NOT NULL,
            sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            extras TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
            updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            UNIQUE(repository_id, name)
         )

tables.name: deploy_secrets
tables.comment: Per-environment per-secret flags: which role the secret plays and whether it is included or overridden. Values are NOT stored here.

columns.name: role
columns.comment: build / deploy / runtime — decides where the secret is injected.

columns.name: included
columns.comment: 0 excludes the secret from this environment without deleting its configuration.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE deploy_secrets (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            deploy_env_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES deploy_environments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            secret_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            role TEXT CHECK(role IN ('build','deploy','runtime')),
            included INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
            override_enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
            UNIQUE(deploy_env_id, secret_name)
         )

tables.name: tasks
tables.comment: Mirror of docs/todo.md and docs/done.md. Polarity is the reverse of bugs — here the Markdown is canonical and this table is rebuilt from it on each sync, because tasks are hand-edited far more often than bugs.

columns.name: task_id
columns.comment: The display id as written in Markdown (T-000042 / F-000013 / D-000001) — TEXT, not a foreign key. Note task_events.task_id is a different thing: an INTEGER FK to tasks.id.

columns.name: priority
columns.comment: No SQL CHECK — critical / high / medium / low are enforced in Rust.

columns.name: status
columns.comment: No SQL CHECK — open / in-progress / review are enforced in Rust.

columns.name: version
columns.comment: Inherited from the nearest preceding '## vX.Y.Z' header in todo.md.

columns.name: source
columns.comment: 'todo' or 'done'. Part of the uniqueness key, so the same id may exist once per source during a transition.

indexes.name: idx_tasks_status
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_status ON tasks(status) WHERE status IS NOT NULL

indexes.name: idx_tasks_repo_source
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_repo_source ON tasks(repository_id, source)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE tasks (
             id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
             repository_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             task_id TEXT NOT NULL,
             prefix TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(prefix IN ('T','F','D')),
             description TEXT NOT NULL,
             effort REAL,
             priority TEXT,
             status TEXT,
             version TEXT,
             source TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(source IN ('todo','done')),
             created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
             updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
             UNIQUE(repository_id, task_id, source)
         )

tables.name: task_events
tables.comment: Append-only task lifecycle log, the task-side twin of bug_events.

columns.name: task_id
columns.comment: INTEGER FK to tasks.id — not the display id (that is tasks.task_id, TEXT).

indexes.name: idx_task_events_type_ts
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_task_events_type_ts ON task_events(event_type, ts)

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE task_events (
             id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
             task_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             event_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(event_type IN (
                 'created','taken','review','done','reopened'
             )),
             ts TEXT NOT NULL,
             from_status TEXT,
             to_status TEXT
         )

tables.name: deploy_events
tables.comment: Log of deploy operations (template render, GitHub secret set/delete). deploy_env_id is nullable so repo-level actions can be recorded too.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 1)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE deploy_events (
             id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
             deploy_env_id INTEGER REFERENCES deploy_environments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             repository_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             action TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(action IN ('render','env_secret_set','env_secret_delete')),
             ts TEXT NOT NULL,
             details TEXT
         )

tables.name: project_renames
tables.comment: Project-level twin of repo_renames (v24). Needed because microservice-api/<name>/ folders on the parent-server side are keyed by project name, which repo_renames does not cover.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE project_renames (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            old_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            new_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            renamed_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
         )

tables.name: sync_events
tables.comment: Log of sync operations, feeding the timeline. repository_id is nullable — a NULL row is a portfolio-wide sync rather than a per-repo one.

columns.name: sync_type
columns.comment: project_sync / tasks / secret / requirements / migration. 'migration' was added in v25 to record deploy-config conflicts resolved by first-env-wins.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE "sync_events" (
             id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
             repository_id INTEGER REFERENCES repositories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
             sync_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(sync_type IN ('project_sync','tasks','secret','requirements','migration')),
             ts TEXT NOT NULL,
             change_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
             details TEXT
         )

tables.name: secret_bundles
tables.comment: v26 — a named, reusable set of secret values (the SSH / DB / npm keys you apply across repos). Portfolio-wide: deliberately not tied to a repository.
tables.def:
CREATE TABLE secret_bundles (
            id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name        TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
            description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
            created_at  TEXT NOT NULL,
            updated_at  TEXT NOT NULL
        )

tables.name: secret_bundle_items
tables.comment: One secret inside a bundle, encrypted with the same key and cipher as deploy_secret_values.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (bundle_id) REFERENCES secret_bundles (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE secret_bundle_items (
            id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            bundle_id   INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES secret_bundles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            secret_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            ciphertext  BLOB NOT NULL,
            nonce       BLOB NOT NULL,
            UNIQUE(bundle_id, secret_name)
        )

tables.name: deploy_secret_values
tables.comment: v27 — persisted deploy secret values, encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. The data key lives in the OS keyring; no plaintext value is ever stored.

columns.name: ciphertext
columns.comment: AES-256-GCM ciphertext. Never logged, never exported.

columns.name: nonce
columns.comment: Per-value random nonce; required to decrypt ciphertext.

constraints.name: - (Foreign key ID: 0)
constraints.def: FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE deploy_secret_values (
            id            INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            deploy_env_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES deploy_environments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
            secret_name   TEXT NOT NULL,
            ciphertext    BLOB NOT NULL,
            nonce         BLOB NOT NULL,
            updated_at    TEXT NOT NULL,
            UNIQUE(deploy_env_id, secret_name)
        )

relations.def: FOREIGN KEY (microservice_project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE SET NULL MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (bug_id) REFERENCES bugs (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (task_id) REFERENCES tasks (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (repository_id) REFERENCES repositories (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (bundle_id) REFERENCES secret_bundles (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
FOREIGN KEY (deploy_env_id) REFERENCES deploy_environments (id) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE MATCH NONE
